evidence_summary: Demonstrate the Wizard's deceptive magic through a physical, crude procedure involving the replacement of straw with bran and pins. The scene must emphasize the tactile nature of the "brain" mixture to establish that Oz's power is based on manipulation rath...

The Scarecrow enters the throne room to receive his brains. Oz performs a crude but effective procedure, replacing the straw in the Scarecrow's head with bran, pins, and needles. The Scarecrow emerges convinced of his newfound intellect.
The_scarecrow enters the throne_room_of_oz with high anticipation.
The_scarecrow emerges from the procedure expressing intellectual satisfaction.
Oz replaces straw in the Scarecrow's head with a mixture of bran and pins.
